subject: Import Warp coordinates into Relion
body:
Hi,

I'm trying to import the coordinates of the Warp-picking into Relion.

The Warp coordinates are saved as .star files, but Relion is only accepting 
.box or _pick.star files as particle coordinate files. I assume that's the 
problem, but there is no error message, it's just extracting zero particles 
in the next step.

Also simply renaming the file to _pick.star or .box isn't working. In this 
case there is the error massage 
"RELION version: 3.1.1-commit-9f3bf1
 exiting with an error ...  ".


I also compared the content of the different files and there are slight 
differences, which I don't know if they matter.
For the Warp .star file there are the columns:
_rlnCoordinateX #1
_rlnCoordinateY #2
_rlnMicrographName #3
_rlnAutopickFigureOfMerit #4

And for Relion Autopick (_autopick.star) or Relion Manual Pick 
(_manualpick.star) the columns are:
_rlnCoordinateX #1 
_rlnCoordinateY #2 
_rlnAutopickFigureOfMerit #3 
_rlnClassNumber #4 
_rlnAnglePsi #5 
For the manualpick file the columns #3 to #5 or indicated with -999.


For all variants, I have an extra file for each micrograph with the unique 
micrograph name in the file name.

I'm currently working with the Relion version: RELION-3.1.1-commit-b9f3bf1


It would be great if you can help me!
Thank you a lot in advance!!!

Best,
Julia
